task_description: The 'log-aggregator' service began returning errors at 14:59 UTC after a configuration change modified a critical parameter. The change appeared safe but interacted poorly with the current load pattern.

commits.author: heidi@company.com
commits.message: fix: update rate limiter connection parameters
commits.diff:
--- a/log-aggregator-service/rate_limiter.go
+++ b/log-aggregator-service/rate_limiter.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 9
+config.Timeout = 1 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load
